pages.title: Purpose
pages.text: Run factory virtually using fractional math (no chunk loading).

pages.title: Characteristics
pages.text: $(li)CM dimension chunks are $(bold)UNLOADED$() -> $(bold)Performance gain.$() $(li)PreFab simulates production using cached rates $(li)Fractional accumulators per resource type $(li)Resources flow based on math, not actual machines

pages.title: What's Happening Behind the Scenes
pages.text: $(bold)Every tick during CACHED$(): $(li)For each resource with cached rate: $(li)`accumulator += rate` $(li)For inputs (negative rates): $(li)If `accumulator <= -1.0`: Extract from Overworld, insert to Importer buffer $(li)For outputs (positive rates): $(li)If `accumulator >= 1.0`: Extract from Exporter buffer, insert to Overworld$(br2)$(bold)Example$() (Iron Ingot at 0.213/tick): Tick 1: accumulator = 0.213 (no action) Tick 2: accumulator = 0.426 (no action) Tick 3: accumulator = 0.639 (no action) Tick 4: accumulator = 0.852 (no action) Tick 5: accumulator = 1.065 → Push 1 iron, remainder 0.065

pages.title: What You Should Do
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)Monitor output$(): Check output chests for products $(li)$(bold)Keep inputs stocked$(): Ensure input chests have materials $(li)$(bold)Let it run$(): CACHED mode is the goal - leave it alone.$(br2)$(bold)Verification$(): $(li)Press F3: Check "C:" value (chunks loaded should be lower) $(li)Output chest should fill at steady rate $(li)Input chests should drain at steady rate

pages.title: Transitions
pages.text: $(bold)From CACHED to HALTED$(): $(li)Input starved (can't extract from Overworld chest) $(li)Output blocked (can't insert to Overworld chest) $(li)Automatic transition, no player action$(br2)$(bold)From CACHED to SIMULATING$(): $(li)Right-click PreFab with Simulation Wrench $(li)Used to recalibrate rates (if you need to make factory changes)$(br2)---
